name: Ria Money Transfer - El Guero Check Cashing
description_short: El Guero Check Cashing is a Houston-area financial services provider offering check cashing, wire transfers, money orders, and bill payments since 1983.
description_long:
El Guero Check Cashing LLC was founded in 1983 and evolved from a supermarket courtesy booth into a standalone check cashing network. The company operates 5 branches in Houston, 1 in South Houston, and 1 in Pasadena, Texas. It serves a primarily bilingual community with Spanish and English-language services.

El Guero offers check cashing as its core service, along with money orders, domestic and international wire transfers, bill payments (including utilities and auto loans), and phone recharge services to multiple Latin American countries. The company operates as an authorized agent for MoneyGram, ViGo by Western Union, and Ria Money Transfer. They highlight check cashing as an alternative to bank delays that cause overdraft fees, positioning their service fee as lower cost than typical bank penalties.

The company emphasizes bilingual customer service and Spanish-language availability across all locations. They actively hire bilingual staff and operate weekend hours to serve working customers. Their service model focuses on speed and convenience for underbanked or unbanked populations who need immediate access to funds from checks or international money transfers.

El Guero is a traditional check-cashing business with legitimate operational history spanning four decades. However, like all check-cashing services, they charge a fee for converting checks to cash, which can range from $5 on small checks to higher percentages on larger amounts. There is no regulatory oversight disclosed, and customers should verify their specific fee structure before using services.
address: El Guero Check Cashing, 1820 N Main St A, Houston, TX 77009

company_info.headquarters: El Guero Check Cashing, 1820 N Main St A, Houston, TX 77009

pros: Established 40+ year history since 1983, indicating stability and community presence
Multiple locations (7 total) across Houston and Pasadena area for accessibility
Bilingual staff and Spanish-language services available
Authorized agent for three major transfer networks: MoneyGram, ViGo by Western Union, and Ria Money Transfer
International money transfer to 8+ countries including Mexico, El Salvador, Honduras, Guatemala, Cuba, Nicaragua, Colombia, Venezuela
Phone recharge services to Latin America at select locations
Extended hours including weekend availability for working customers
Bill payment services for major utilities and creditors (Reliant Energy, CenterPoint, Ford Credit, Santander)
cons: Check cashing subject to verification with company and bank, meaning not all checks guaranteed to clear
Money transfer services have per-person quantity limits, restricting larger transfers
Limited website information about specific fee structures or pricing
Only 7 physical locations, limiting accessibility outside Houston/Pasadena metro area
No online or mobile check cashing option mentioned; in-person visits required
best_for: Bilingual Spanish/English speakers in Houston metropolitan area needing quick check access
Individuals sending remittances to Latin American countries, particularly Mexico and Central America
Unbanked or underbanked workers avoiding bank deposit delays and overdraft fees
Customers needing to pay utilities or bills without bank accounts
diagnosis: El Guero Check Cashing is best for bilingual Spanish/English speakers in the Houston area who need immediate access to check funds, international money transfers to Latin America, or bill payment services without a traditional bank account. The main caveat is that check cashing involves fees (typically $5+ per check), and the company's verification requirements mean not all checks are guaranteed to cash; customers should confirm their specific check will clear before relying on the service.
services: Wire transfers to any country in the world
International money transfers via ViGo by Western Union
International money transfers via Ria Money Transfer
Utility bill payments (Reliant Energy, CenterPoint Energy)
International phone recharges to Mexico, El Salvador, Honduras, Guatemala, Cuba, Nicaragua, Colombia, Venezuela
